title: Skopeo available in GH Action ubuntu image is too old for docker-daemon
body:
In github actions, I experience errors such as:

```
E0215 12:19:58.018097    5473 portforward.go:351] "Unhandled Error" err="error creating error stream for port 5001 -> 5001: Timeout occurred"
time="2026-02-15T12:19:58Z" level=fatal msg="writing blob: starting a load operation in docker engine: Error response from daemon: client version 1.41 is too old. Minimum supported API version is 1.44, please upgrade your client to a newer version"
```

and 

```
E0215 12:20:27.051206    5795 portforward.go:351] "Unhandled Error" err="error creating error stream for port 5001 -> 5001: Timeout occurred"
time="2026-02-15T12:20:27Z" level=fatal msg="writing blob: io: read/write on closed pipe"
```

Looks like what I've been using as vanilla in Ubuntu runners:

```sh
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install skopeo
skopeo --version
```

leads to:

```
skopeo is already the newest version (1.13.3+ds1-2ubuntu0.24.04.3).
0 upgraded, 0 newly installed, 0 to remove and 18 not upgraded.
skopeo version 1.13.3
```

which is allegedly too old and causing these errors.

I didn't find any Ubuntu, Ubuntu-compatible installation steps here: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/abf6bace6a494141788a865b64b1a3db291f31cb/install.md?plain=1#L1

I am resorting in using Homebrew in github action runners to source a newer Skopeo versions, which makes these errors disappear, but it's a slow mechanism. 

👉 I am wondering if there isn't a faster way to have a fresh Skopeo version in GitHub ubuntu-latest runners, easily.
